accessToken.title: Meta access token
accessToken.description: A Meta (Graph API) access token. Get a free one at developers.facebook.com (any app + user token). Required by Meta to query the Ad Library.

searchTerms.title: Search terms
searchTerms.description: Keyword(s) to search ads for (e.g. 'meal plan app').

countries.title: Countries (ISO)
countries.description: Reachable countries (e.g. DE, FR, GB, US). EU countries return ALL ads (DSA); others return political/issue ads only.
